SAVE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.CommandType
Save the current simulation state.
SaveCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command to save the current simulation to the given file path.

Creates an instance of a SaveCommand record class.

Controller providing save/load UI actions for the simulation.

saveSystem(Grid, File) - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.SaveSystem
Overload that accepts a File.
saveSystem(Grid, String) - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.SaveSystem
Serializes the provided grid to the given filename (appends ".sim").
SaveSystem - Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems
Utility for serializing and deserializing the grid to disk.
SaveSystem() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Systems.SaveSystem

setGrowth(int) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
Sets the current growth value for this entity.
setGrowthRate(int) - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.CanGrow
Sets the growth rate (units per step).
setGrowthRate(int) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
Sets the growth rate used for subsequent growth steps.
setMaterial(Material) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell

Command to set the material at the specified position.

Sets the editing mode.

Sets the validation handler that will be called when the user confirms valid simulation parameters.
setPos(Vec2) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
Replaces this cell's position with the supplied Vec2.

Sets the selected entity type.
setSelectedMaterial(Material) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.UiState
Sets the selected material.
setSimulationState(SimulationState) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.GridController
 
setSimulationState(SimulationState) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.HelloController
Injects the shared SimulationState and optionally updates the info label.
setSimulationState(SimulationState) - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.NeedsSimulationState
Inject the shared SimulationState so the controller can read model data.

Injects the current simulation state into the controller.
setSimulationState(SimulationState) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.TimeController
Injects the shared SimulationState.
setSpeed(double) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationState
Sets the simulation speed when the provided value is positive.
setUiState(UiState) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.DrawingController
 
setUiState(UiState) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.GridController
 
setUiState(UiState) - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.NeedsUiState
Injects the shared UiState instance into the controller.
setUiState(UiState) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.RandomController
Injects the shared UiState instance into the controller.
SimulationLoop - Class in com.example.simul2d.Core
Controls and runs the main simulation loop.

SimulationState - Class in com.example.simul2d.Core
Encapsulates the mutable state of the simulation.
SimulationState() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationState
Creates a default simulation state.
speed() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.SpeedCommand
Returns the value of the speed record component.
SPEED1 - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.CommandType
Set simulation speed to slow (1x).
SPEED2 - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.CommandType
Set simulation speed to medium (2x).
SPEED3 - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.CommandType
Set simulation speed to fast (3x).
SpeedCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command representing a direct speed set request.
SpeedCommand(int) - Constructor for record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.SpeedCommand
Creates an instance of a SpeedCommand record class.

Returns the value of the start record component.

Returns the value of the start record component.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.HelloApplication
 
startSimulation() - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Console.ConsoleMain
Start the simulation and return a SimulationRun containing the created SimulationState, the SimulationLoop and the thread running the loop.
startSimulation(int, int, boolean) - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Console.ConsoleMain
 
state() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Console.ConsoleMain.SimulationRun
Returns the value of the state record component.
step() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
Executes a simulation step for this cell, updating all contained entities that implement CanGrow.
StepCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command to advance the simulation a fixed number of steps.
StepCommand(int) - Constructor for record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.StepCommand
Creates an instance of a StepCommand record class.
stepsNumber() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.StepCommand
Returns the value of the stepsNumber record component.
stop() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationLoop
Requests that the simulation loop stop at the next convenient point.
stop() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.HelloApplication
 
subtract(Vec2) - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.grid.Vec2
Returns a new Vec2 representing the vector subtraction of the provided vector from this vector.
